name: Robb's Special Day Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together buttermilk, eggs, and melted butter until smooth.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, mixing with a hand beater or mixer on high speed until the batter is smooth and well combined.
When waffle iron is ready to use:
4. Pour batter into the center of the lower half of the waffle iron, spreading it about 1 inch from the edges.
5. Lower the cover gently onto the waffle iron.
6. Cook until no steam escapes. Do not raise the cover during baking.
7. Once cooked, lift the cover and loosen the waffle with a fork. Serve immediately.
8. Reheat the waffle iron before pouring in the next batch of batter.
